plugins.name: arbiter
plugins.description: Use multiple AI assistants from one interface. Arbiter orchestrates Codex CLI and Gemini CLI inside Claude Code — get parallel answers, take majority votes on decisions, cross-check code, or run 3 independent implementations in parallel and pick the best one.

plugins.name: content-ops
plugins.description: Publish technical articles to dev.to, Hashnode, Twitter/X, and Hacker News without leaving your editor. Includes a deterministic linter that catches em-dashes, tag format errors, and description length before publishing — plus 10 skills for creating, QA-ing, and distributing content from your existing artifacts.

plugins.name: delve
plugins.description: Autonomous deep research with claim-level verification. Delve runs a 5-stage pipeline (SCAN → DECOMPOSE → DIVE → VERIFY → SYNTHESIZE) that dispatches parallel research subagents, extracts atomic claims, then adversarially verifies each one before producing a synthesis report with quality labels and full source attribution.

plugins.name: genesis
plugins.description: Evolve startup ideas through AI-powered natural selection. Three specialized agents run generate-critique-select-refine loops, scoring across 8 dimensions with strategy weights, to surface winners with ICP, monetization model, and week-1 execution plans.

plugins.name: glyph
plugins.description: Generate polished terminal demo GIFs from a natural language description. Glyph synthesizes asciicast recordings with realistic typing, configurable themes, and built-in PII auditing — no real shell commands are executed.

plugins.name: herald
plugins.description: Local-first news intelligence for AI agents. Herald collects RSS and Hacker News articles, clusters related stories by title similarity, scores by source weight and recency, and generates ranked Markdown briefs — all locally with zero API keys.

plugins.name: reporter
plugins.description: Report bugs, request features, and ask questions for any heurema plugin — without leaving Claude Code. Auto-detects your repo from git remote, collects environment context, previews the issue, and submits via gh CLI with clipboard fallback.

plugins.name: sentinel
plugins.description: Automated security audit for your AI workstation. Sentinel runs 18 deterministic checks across secrets exposure, MCP trust, plugin permissions, hook coverage, trust boundaries, and configuration hygiene — then scores your security posture 0–100 with guided remediation for every finding.

plugins.name: signum
plugins.description: The code is the easy part. Signum is a contract-first AI development pipeline for Claude Code: spec quality gate (A–F) that blocks weak specs before implementation starts, holdout scenarios the Engineer never sees for blind testing, multi-model audit (Claude + Codex + Gemini in parallel), execution policy enforcement, repo-level invariant contracts, and a self-contained tamper-evident proofpack artifact the AI couldn't game.

plugins.name: skillpulse
plugins.description: Skill telemetry for Claude Code. A PostToolUse hook that logs every skill activation to local JSONL — which skills load, which get followed, how often. The only tool that tracks whether the model actually executed a skill's instructions. Foundation for automated skill quality evaluation and self-improvement pipelines.
